name: webobsidian
description: WebObsidian — a self-hosted Obsidian-compatible web app

scripts.build: npm --workspace @picassio/sync-core run build && npm --workspace web-vault-sync run build && npm --workspace web run build && npm --workspace server run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace @picassio/sync-core run build && npm --workspace server run typecheck && npm --workspace web run typecheck && npm --workspace web-vault-sync run typecheck
scripts.test: npm --workspace @picassio/sync-core test && npm --workspace server test && npm --workspace web test && npm --workspace web-vault-sync test
scripts.test:e2e:browser: npm --workspace @picassio/sync-core run build && npm --workspace web run build && node e2e/browser-pair.mjs
scripts.test:e2e:headless: npm --workspace @picassio/sync-core run build && npm --workspace web-vault-sync run build && npm --workspace server run build && node e2e/headless-pair.mjs
